title: Li Auto Stock Analyst Price Targets and Ratings
text: Analyst Price Targets and Ratings for Li Auto (LI) stock: Consensus Price Target: $19.66, representing a 6.21% upside from the current price of $18.51. Target Range: $15.50 (low) to $25.00 (high). Analyst Consensus: Hold rating, indicating analysts expect the stock to perform similarly to the overall market. Ten analysts cover Li Auto stock. Recent notable changes include: Johnson Wan (Jefferies) downgraded from Strong Buy to Hold, reducing target from $29 to $18 on January 23, 2026. Nick Lai (JP Morgan) maintains a Sell rating with a $16 price target as of March 13, 2026. Roman Lukianchikov (Freedom Broker) maintains a Strong Buy with the highest target of $25. Revenue Forecasts: 2026: $133.74B (up 19.08% YoY), 2027: $163.84B (up 22.51% YoY). EPS Projections: 2026: $1.66 (up 53.62%), 2027: $3.40 (up 104.82%). The consensus suggests recovery momentum after 2025's -22.25% revenue decline.
